Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

Rate this item


description 2/6

When attacking, has a 18% chance to deal an additional 18000 pure damage, ignoring armor and shield.

description 4/6

When attacking, has a 18% chance to deal an additional 30000 pure damage, ignoring armor and shield. Every critical hit unleashes the strength of the figther’s shadow, moving the fighter’s shadow, moving the fighter to the enemy with the lowest health to deliver a series of two strikes. The first blow stuns the target for 1,7 sec, while the second blow deals 100000 additional damage over 3,5 sec.

description 6/6

When attacking, has a 22% chance to deal an additional 50000 pure damage, ignoring armor and shield. Every critical hit unleashes the strength of the figther’s shadow, moving the fighter’s shadow, moving the fighter to the enemy with the lowest health to deliver a series of two strikes. The first blow stuns the target for 2,5 sec, while the second blow deals 170000 additional damage over 3,5 sec. After the teleportation, attacks restore health equal to 80% of the damage done for 5 sec. Also, the fighter is invulnerable for 1 sec. When this fighter’s health drops below 50% and he receives damage, he deals 85000 damage to the attacker and vanishes, diverting enemy attention away from himself. Activates once in a while.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, deal extra pure damage equal to 10% of the target’s max health.

description 4/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, deal extra pure damage equal to 10% of the target’s max health. When the unit’s shadow power is released, the second strike poisons the enemy. That enemy takes 175000 magic damage over 3 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 20% per second.

description 6/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, deal extra pure damage equal to 10% of the target’s max health. When the unit’s shadow power is released, the second strike poisons the enemy. That enemy takes 175000 magic damage over 3 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 20% per second. When the unit’s shadow power is released, if the target has less than 15% health after the second strike, the target dies instantly.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, steal 15% of the target’s max health.

description 4/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, steal 15% of the target’s max health. When the unit’s shadow power is released, they become invisible, so enemies cannot target them with an attack or ability for 2 sec.

description 6/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, steal 15% of the target’s max health. When the unit’s shadow power is released, they become invisible, so enemies cannot target them with an attack or ability for 2 sec. When Shadow disappears, they restore 25% of their max health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, poison the target. That enemy takes 175000 magic damage over 3 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 15% per second.

description 4/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, poison the target. That enemy takes 175000 magic damage over 3 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 15% per second. When the unit’s shadow power is released, Shadow’s damage increases by 50% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Shadow’s attacks, in addition to dealing pure damage, poison the target. That enemy takes 175000 magic damage over 3 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 15% per second. When the unit’s shadow power is released, Shadow’s damage increases by 50% for 5 sec. Shadow’s damage, crits, and dodge are increased by 25% for the duration of the battle.

Materials

Shadow Essence
Cosmic Eye

Arena battle
